'''Haffrin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Haffrin system/Legends|Haffrin system]] of the [[Esstran sector/Legends|Esstran sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="GNN13" /><ref name="EAOC" /> Built millennia ago, a [[Shrine of Kooroo]] was fabricated on the planet using native stone.<ref name="GNN13" />
